description: DSK-97 Fear of Lost Teeth joins the canonical Fear-of cycle as the first black slot. Predicate is the Scryfall `s:dsk name:"Fear of"` name-prefix query — load-bearing, designer-coordinated, fourteen-member roster. Card is vision-enriched (tags_hub populated wave 84-ish, Oriana Menendez art, full Vision body) and meets the cycle's attachment threshold. Precedent: DSK-98 (Fear of the Dark) was attached pre-trivia using the same canonical-name predicate, so this attach honors established Edgelord doctrine for this node. Side cleanup: node body's 'On-disk but not yet enriched' section was stale (claimed DSK-97 and DSK-98 were un-enriched stubs; they aren't); refactored into 'Vision-enriched, trivia-pending' subsection and corrected the corpus-coverage count from '7 of 14' to '9 of 14'.
citations: [Scryfall: set DSK, query s:dsk name:"Fear of"]
[MTG Wiki: Duskmourn: House of Horror — Cycles section]
[Per-card Scryfall page DSK-97: type_line Enchantment Creature — Nightmare, oracle_text death-trigger 1 damage + 1 life, flavor_text Sam-teeth-wriggling]
[Wizards: Duskmourn Vision Design Handoff — Annie Sardelis, phobias-as-antagonists thesis]
other_candidates_considered: Trivia-side Connections bullets between DSK-97 and the other cycle members — deferred. DSK-97 does not yet have a `## Trivia` section; cycle-member Connections bullets in other cards (Being Hunted, Burning Alive) are trivia-tier work, not Edgelord work. When triviabot writes the DSK-97 trivia, the Connections section will be populated then.
No stronger orphan-completion or replacement candidate surfaced in a quick corpus walk. The parent's staged move was correct.
next_pass_suggestions: DSK-97 Fear of Lost Teeth needs trivia pass (currently vision-only, no `## Trivia` section) — feed it to bbl-triviabot when slate space allows. Same for DSK-98 Fear of the Dark (vision-only, attached but no trivia).
Five Fear-of cycle members remain out-of-corpus (Immobility, Surveillance, Impostors, Isolation, Missing Out). Watch future Collectr CSV uploads; full cycle completion would be 14/14 attached.

Node body's flavor speculation about 'three rares (the Dark, Missing Out, Infinity)' is now partially incorrect — Scryfall has DSK-98 at common, not rare. Caveats section already flagged this in a side-note; a future enlightened pass could rewrite the rare-cluster paragraph cleanly.
